libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generated tests should keep WebClient coverage in-process with a local Vert.x HttpServer; no external service or Docker image is needed. Ensure the native test runtime sets system properties equivalent to Gradle nativeTest runtime args: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true for 5.0.1 / Netty 4.2.x on JDK 25.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient classes are present but depend on optional Vert.x OAuth2 support; avoid targeting OAuth2-specific APIs unless adding the optional oauth2 dependency is intentionally in scope.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative; if Netty changes in later Vert.x 5.0.x versions, the unsafe workaround may need revalidation.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; Netty 4.2 disables sun.misc.Unsafe by default on Java 24+, matching the existing 5.0.0 workaround and the JDK 25 native-run failure context.
